scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: At Yeshiva University, students pursue academic excellence and personal growth in a values-driven community in the heart of New York City. Our unique dual curriculum, vibrant campus life, and strong career outcomes make YU a place where you can thrive intellectually, spiritually, and professionally.
